items.title: [正面] Okay played for an hour and i can say it is a hidd...
items.summary:
Okay played for an hour and i can say it is a hidden gem
Although it has ChatGPT translations i can still make out many of what the game is trying to tell us.
Gameplay is unique and slay the spire like.
In a sea of similar games comes a charming unique game,
I'll keep playing.
Only thing is the game needs more ADVERTISTMENT to make it popular so more servers can be made.
